html:
Exclusive to:

The Junky Fence is a structure found in Junk Yard. It surrounds the Junk Yard and roughly marks the boundary beyond which Scrappy Werepig cannot go. Whenever Abandoned Junk respawns in the Junk Yard, all Junky Fences are restored. When destroyed, a Junky Fence drops Twigs and has a 25% chance to also drop a Scrap.

Junky Fences also appear on Hermit Island after defeating Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, and Possessed Varg. Unlike those in the Junk Yard, these Junky Fences do not respawn once destroyed.

Trivia

  • There is 3 unused models of dropped Junky Fence.
  • In the early beta Junky Fences couldn't be destroyed by the attacks of the Scrappy Werepig.

Gallery

  • Junky Fence concept art from Scrappy Scavengers Annonce from Rhymes with Play.
  • Junky Fence concept art from Scrappy Scavengers Annonce from Rhymes with Play.
  • Unused Item Dropped Image
  • Unused Item Dropped Image
  • Unused Item Dropped Image

"fence_junk"
“Tell me it's ugly, I won't take a fence.”
–Wilson
“Not the prettiest fence in the world, but it works.”
–Willow
“Is ugly little fence, but does its job.”
–Wolfgang
“Even these discarded pieces can manage to be useful.”
–Wendy
“AH. FEELS LIKE HOME”
–WX-78
“Unpleasant to the eye, but I suppose practicality outweighs aesthetics.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's got nothin' on a sturdy wooden fence.”
–Woodie
“Hmph. It'll certainly repel anyone with taste.”
–Maxwell
“A sturdy barrier.”
–Wigfrid
“It's not the nicest-looking fence.”
–Webber
“It's constructed well enough, but it lacks presentation.”
–Warly
“Friends wearing metal clothes”
–Wormwood
“It does the trick.”
–Winona
“A metal fence for our defense.”
–Wortox
“Made of bunch of metal bits.”
–Wurt
“I guess it's better than just leaving all that scrap metal lying around.”
–Walter
“As long as it keeps things out, I don't care how it looks.”
–Wanda
The Junky Fence is a structure found in Junk Yard. It surrounds the Junk Yard and roughly marks the boundary beyond which Scrappy Werepig cannot go. Whenever Abandoned Junk respawns in the Junk Yard, all Junky Fences are restored. When destroyed, a Junky Fence drops Twigs and has a 25% chance to also drop a Scrap.
Junky Fences also appear on Hermit Island after defeating Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, and Possessed Varg. Unlike those in the Junk Yard, these Junky Fences do not respawn once destroyed.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
There is 3 unused models of dropped Junky Fence.
In the early beta Junky Fences couldn't be destroyed by the attacks of the Scrappy Werepig.
